decision_log.decision: Treat sync wish as a Douban time child feature with an independent scheduler.
decision_log.reason: Latest user direction explicitly separates product ownership from runtime chain boundaries.
rejected_alternatives: Make sync wish a new independent module
Run sync wish from ranking subscription cron

turn_log.entry: Created the missing plan and progress ledger because the goal referenced paths that did not exist.
Completed task 1.1: added wish sync config defaults and folio wish storage helpers; compileall and runtime contract tests pass.
Completed task 1.2: added DoubanCenterWish independent scheduler declaration and wish runner entry; compileall and runtime contract tests pass.
Completed task 2.1: added Douban wish list access, parsing, request injection, and cookie movie headers; compileall, DoubanApi wish tests, and runtime contract tests pass.

Completed task 2.2: implemented wish baseline/queue state machine (first run baseline-only, later runs enqueue new items, default single page); compileall, wish sync tests, and full 175-test suite pass.

Completed task 3.1: process wish queue recognizes items and subscribes via existing chain writing rank_key=douban_wish, records failed recognition without crashing, and does not retry existing subscriptions indefinitely; compileall, wish sync tests, and full 178-test suite pass.

Completed task 3.2: persisted wish sync read errors without clearing queue/seen state, recorded subscription failures into wish failed state, and executed queue processing from the wish scheduler; compileall, wish sync tests, and full 180-test suite pass.

Completed task 4.1: added the Sync Wish overview flow, surfaced wish queue/failed state under the folio overview, returned wish_status from the config API, and updated backend contract tests; compileall, focused tests, config frontend contract, and full 182-test suite pass.

Completed task 4.2: added the Sync Wish tab before Sync Watching in Config.vue, exposed wish controls and status, rebuilt Vue federation assets with bundled pnpm because npm is not on PATH, and verified compileall, frontend contract, overview tests, and full 184-test suite.
